<script>
  document.addEventListener('wpcf7mailsent', function(event) {
    var inputs = event.detail && event.detail.inputs ? event.detail.inputs : [];
    var email = '', phone = '', firstName = '', lastName = '';

    inputs.forEach(function(input) {
      if (input.name.match(/email/i)) email = input.value;
      if (input.name.match(/tel|phone|telefone|whatsapp/i)) phone = input.value;
      if (input.name.match(/name|nome/i) && !input.name.match(/last|sobrenome/i)) firstName = input.value;
      if (input.name.match(/last|sobrenome/i)) lastName = input.value;
    });

    // Normalizar telefone para E.164
    if (phone && !phone.startsWith('+')) {
      phone = '+55' + phone.replace(/\D/g, '');
    }

    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      event: 'generate_lead',
      event_id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      lead_source: 'form',
      form_name: event.detail.contactFormId || 'cf7',
      user_data: {
        email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),
        phone: phone,
        first_name: firstName.toLowerCase().trim(),
        last_name: lastName.toLowerCase().trim()
      }
    });
  });
</script>

<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  window.dataLayer.push({
    event: 'view_content',
    event_id: crypto.randomUUID(),
    content_type: 'page',
    content_id: window.location.pathname
  });
</script>

<script>
(function() {

    function setCookie(cookieName, cookieValue) {
        var expirationTime = 15792000; // Um mês em segundos
        expirationTime = expirationTime * 1000; // Converte expirationtime para milissegundos
        var date = new Date(); 
        var dateTimeNow = date.getTime(); 

        date.setTime(dateTimeNow + expirationTime); // Define o tempo de expiração (Tempo agora + um mês)
        var expirationDate = date.toUTCString(); // Converte milissegundos para string de tempo UTC
        
       document.cookie = cookieName+"="+cookieValue+"; SameSite=None; Secure; expires="+expirationDate+"; path=/; domain=.colegiomentoria.com.br";
    }
  
    // Dados dos cookies em um objeto
    var cookiesData = {
        'ck_em': '{{[CT] [VAR] Email}}',
        'ck_fn': '{{[CT] [VAR] FN}}',
        'ck_ln': '{{[CT] [VAR] LN}}',
        'ck_ph': '{{[CT] [VAR] Phone}}',
        'ck_db': '{{[CT] [VAR] Birthday | Formatado}}',
        'ck_st': '{{[CT] [VAR] Visitor API - Estado}}',
        'ck_ct': '{{[CT] [VAR] Visitor API - Cidade}}',
    };
    
    // Usando um loop para percorrer o objeto e definir cada cookie
    for (var name in cookiesData) {
        setCookie(name, cookiesData[name]);
    }

})();

</script>

<script>
(function() {
  // Captura fbclid da URL e define o cookie _fbc para o Meta Pixel
  // Melhora o EMQ (Event Match Quality) garantindo fbc disponivel no PageView

  function getUrlParam(name) {
    var url = window.location.href;
    name = name.replace(/[\[\]]/g, '\\$&');
    var regex = new RegExp('[?&]' + name + '(=([^&#]*)|&|#|$)');
    var results = regex.exec(url);
    if (!results) return null;
    if (!results[2]) return '';
    return decodeURIComponent(results[2].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
  }

  var fbclid = getUrlParam('fbclid');
  if (!fbclid) return;

  // Formato padrao do cookie _fbc: fb.1.{timestamp}.{fbclid}
  var timestamp = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  var fbcValue = 'fb.1.' + timestamp + '.' + fbclid;

  // Define o cookie _fbc por 90 dias no dominio raiz
  var expires = new Date(Date.now() + 90 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toUTCString();
  document.cookie = '_fbc=' + fbcValue + '; expires=' + expires + '; path=/; domain=.colegiomentoria.com.br; SameSite=Lax';

})();
</script>

<script>
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}

// Consent Mode v2 — Default: tudo negado
gtag('consent', 'default', {
  'ad_storage': 'denied',
  'analytics_storage': 'denied',
  'ad_user_data': 'denied',
  'ad_personalization': 'denied',
  'wait_for_update': 500
});

// Visitante retornando: ler cookie e aplicar preferências salvas
(function(){
  var m = document.cookie.match(/(?:^|;\s*)consent_preferences=([^;]*)/);
  if(m){
    try {
      var p = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(m[1]));
      gtag('consent', 'update', {
        'ad_storage': p.advertising ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'analytics_storage': p.analytics ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_user_data': p.advertising ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_personalization': p.advertising ? 'granted' : 'denied'
      });
    } catch(e){}
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('wpcf7mailsent', function(event) {
    // Capturar os campos do formulário
    var form = event.target;

    // Capturar o campo "your-name"
    var nameField = form.querySelector('[name="your-name"]');
    var nameValue = nameField ? nameField.value.trim() : null;

    // Separar em "first_name" e "last_name"
    var firstName = null;
    var lastName = null;
    if (nameValue) {
        var nameParts = nameValue.split(' '); // Divide o nome completo
        firstName = nameParts[0] || null; // Primeiro nome
        lastName = nameParts.slice(1).join(' ') || null; // Sobrenome(s)
    }

    // Capturar o campo "your-email"
    var emailField = form.querySelector('[name="your-email"]');
    var emailValue = emailField ? emailField.value : null;

    // Capturar o campo "your-phone" e formatar
    var phoneField = form.querySelector('[name="whatsapp"]');
    var phoneValue = phoneField ? phoneField.value : null; // Pega o valor original

    if (phoneValue) {
        // 1. Remove todos os caracteres não numéricos, incluindo o '+' se presente
        phoneValue = phoneValue.replace(/\D/g, '');

        // 2. Garante que comece com '55'
        if (!phoneValue.startsWith('55')) {
            phoneValue = '55' + phoneValue;
        }
    }
    
    // Capturar o campo "datanascimento"
    var dbField = form.querySelector('[name="datanascimento"]');
    var dbValue = dbField ? dbField.value : null;

    // Enviar os dados para o dataLayer
    dataLayer.push({
        'event': 'wpcf7successfulsubmit',
        'CF7formID': event.detail.contactFormId,
        'name': nameValue,
        'first_name': firstName,
        'last_name': lastName,
        'email': emailValue,
        'phone': phoneValue, // Agora 'phoneValue' estará no formato desejado
        'birthday': dbValue
    });
}, false);
</script>
